case_title: OCTAVIA INVESTMENT COMPANY vs. NEWKIRK, TIM F. et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCTAVIA INVESTMENT COMPANY LIMITED A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-13-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-19-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWKIRK, TIM F. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID S. KAHN. M. NORMAN, REPORTER. J. PASTOR CLERK. C/C FOR S/C. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. STIP FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AND STAY OF EXECUTION TIL JULY 31, 1996. STIP AND JUDGMENT TO BE FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWKIRK, TIM F. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1544 CALIFORNIA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM 6-30-96, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS IF NOT, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT & DAMAGES OF $2126.40 & $195 COSTS & ATNYS FEES. OTHERWISE, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMNT FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEWKIRK, TIM F.

OTHERWISE, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMNT FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.
